post.summary: Ensures that the authenticated user has an account.
post.description: This endpoint checks if the authenticated user already has an account. If they do, a 204 No Content response is returned. If they don't, a new account is created for them and a 201 Created response is returned. If the user's information cannot be retrieved from Auth0, a 404 Not Found response is returned. If the user is not authenticated, a 401 Unauthorized response is returned. If an account exists but is marked as deleted, a 409 Conflict response is returned.

204.description: The authenticated user already has an account.

404.description: The user's information could not be retrieved from Auth0, so an account could not be created.

409.description: An account for the user already exists but is marked as deleted.

401.description: The user is not authenticated, so an account cannot be ensured.

get.summary: Gets the authenticated user's account information.
get.description: This endpoint retrieves the account information of the authenticated user. If the user is not authenticated, a 401 Unauthorized response is returned. If the user's account cannot be found, a 404 Not Found response is returned. If the user's account is found, a 200 OK response is returned with the account information.

200.description: The user's account information was successfully retrieved.

404.description: The user's account could not be found, so their account information cannot be retrieved.

401.description: The user is not authenticated, so their account information cannot be retrieved.

post.summary: Restores the authenticated user's account if it was previously marked as deleted.
post.description: This endpoint restores the authenticated user's account if it was previously marked as deleted. If the user is not authenticated, a 401 Unauthorized response is returned. If the user's account cannot be found, a 404 Not Found response is returned. If the user's account is successfully restored, a 204 No Content response is returned.

204.description: The user's account was successfully restored.

404.description: The user's account could not be found, so it cannot be restored.

401.description: The user is not authenticated, so their account cannot be restored.

get.description: Retrieves the weather forecast for the next 5 days.

200.description: The weather forecast was successfully retrieved.

deletedAt.description: The date and time when the account was marked as deleted.

nickname.description: The user's nickname, which may be null if the user has not set a nickname.

firstName.description: The user's first name, which is required and cannot be null or empty.

lastName.description: The user's last name, which is required and cannot be null or empty.

avatarUrl.description: The URL of the user's avatar, which may be null if the user has not set an avatar.
